description_long: This object is a compact, circular building with a prominent black dome roof, characteristic of a planetarium. The dome sits atop a cylindrical base featuring a series of evenly spaced arched windows or decorative recesses, giving the structure a classical yet functional appearance. A small, flat awning or entryway juts out from one side, suggesting the location of the main entrance. The exterior walls are rendered in a light gray or stone color, contrasting with the dark dome above. The building appears solid and robust, likely constructed from concrete or stone with a metal or composite dome. There are no visible signs, telescopes, or additional structures attached to the building.
description: A small, round building with a black dome roof and arched window details, resembling a classic planetarium. The structure features a light gray base and a single entryway.
description_view_0: The dome and arched windows are clearly visible, with the entrance awning extending from the right side.
description_view_1: The dome is seen from a different angle, with the entrance awning now less visible and the arched windows wrapping around the base.
description_view_2: The dome dominates the view, with the entrance awning visible at the lower left and the arched windows encircling the base.
description_view_3: The dome and base are seen from the rear, with the entrance awning on the left and the arched windows continuing around the structure.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features a small, flat awning extending from the cylindrical base, with no visible steps or ornate decorations, emphasizing functional simplicity.
